ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robot_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot class */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the robot class belongs to (e.g., Combat) */,
  "robot_class" TEXT /* Name of the robot class (e.g., 1 lb - Antweight) */,
  "maximum_capacity" TEXT /* Maximum number of robots allowed in this class */,
  "currently_registered" INTEGER /* Number of currently registered robots in this class */,
  "waiting_list" INTEGER /* Number of robots on the waiting list for this class */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for participating in this class */,
  "pit_crew_allowed" TEXT /* Whether pit crews are allowed for this class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the robot class */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed rules and guidelines for the class */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the class */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the class (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "robot_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the robot class the participant registered for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team if the participant is part of a team */,
  "team_member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant has paid the entry fee */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant paid the entry fee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., Organizer, Participant, Spectator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_robot_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_class_id") REFERENCES robot_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waiting_lists" (
  "waiting_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waiting list entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who is on the waiting list */,
  "robot_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot class for which the participant is waiting */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the participant was added to the waiting list */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the participant on the waiting list */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the waiting list entry (e.g., Active, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waiting_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waiting_lists_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waiting_lists_robot_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_class_id") REFERENCES robot_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Combat, Autonomous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log entry */,
  "robot_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot class related to the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event (e.g., Registered, Updated Capacity) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user who performed the action (e.g., Organizer, Participant, Spectator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_robot_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_class_id") REFERENCES robot_classes ("class_id")
)
